entities.name: PICALM
entities.description: Phosphatidylinositol clathrin assembly lymphoid-myeloid leukemia gene, AD risk factor; PICALM protein forms complex with AP2 to function as autophagic cargo receptor

entities.name: APP
entities.description: Amyloid precursor protein gene; its cleaved C-terminal fragment is degraded via autophagy mediated by AP2/PICALM

entities.name: ATG5
entities.description: Autophagy related 5 gene; autophagy-mediated APP-CTF degradation is Atg5-dependent

entities.name: MAP1LC3
entities.description: Microtubule-associated protein 1 light chain 3 (LC3) gene; LC3 binds AP2/PICALM complex

entities.name: AP2A1
entities.description: Adaptor protein complex 2 subunit gene; AP2 regulates cellular levels of APP-CTF

entities.name: Alzheimer disease
entities.description: Neurodegenerative disease characterized by aggregates of amyloid-beta peptides and tau protein

entities.name: amyloid beta
entities.description: Amyloid-beta peptide that aggregates in AD; clearance mediated by autophagy

entities.name: tau
entities.description: Tau protein that aggregates in Alzheimer disease

entities.name: APP-CTF
entities.description: Amyloid precursor protein cleaved C-terminal fragment; degraded via autophagy pathway mediated by AP2/PICALM-LC3 interaction

entities.name: LC3
entities.description: Microtubule-associated protein 1 light chain 3; autophagosome marker that binds AP2 and PICALM

entities.name: AP2
entities.description: Adaptor protein complex 2; identified as LC3 binding protein; regulates APP-CTF levels and mediates autophagy-dependent degradation

entities.name: PICALM protein
entities.description: Phosphatidylinositol clathrin assembly lymphoid-myeloid leukemia protein; forms complex with AP2 to cross-link LC3 with APP-CTF

entities.name: ATG5 protein
entities.description: Autophagy protein 5; required for autophagy-mediated APP-CTF degradation

entities.name: autophagy
entities.description: Major cellular pathway for removal of aggregated proteins; mediates APP-CTF degradation and amyloid beta clearance

entities.name: endocytic pathway
entities.description: Cellular endocytosis pathway from which APP-CTF is shipped to autophagic degradation

entities.name: clathrin-mediated endocytosis
entities.description: Endocytic pathway involving clathrin assembly, associated with PICALM function

entities.name: AP2/PICALM-mediated autophagic cargo recognition
entities.description: AP2/PICALM complex functions as autophagic cargo receptor for recognition and shipment of APP-CTF from endocytic pathway to LC3-marked autophagic degradation pathway

entities.name: amyloid plaques
entities.description: Aggregates of amyloid-beta peptides, hallmark of Alzheimer disease

entities.name: tau aggregation
entities.description: Aggregation of tau protein, hallmark of Alzheimer disease
